mapper.sql: id, domain, status, is_primary, verified, verified_time, verify_token, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_tenant_domain WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM sys_tenant_domain WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_tenant_domain WHERE domain = #{domain} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_tenant_domain WHERE domain = #{domain} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_tenant_domain WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_primary = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant_domain SET domain = #{domain}, status = #{status}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, verified = #{verified}, verified_time = #{verifiedTime}, verify_token = #{verifyToken}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, deleted = #{deleted}, version = #{version} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_tenant_domain SET is_primary = FALSE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_primary = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE
